## Summary

Describe what changed and why.

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Refactor
- [ ] Docs
- [ ] Tests

## Testing

- [ ] `npm run lint`
- [ ] `npm test`
- [ ] `npm run test:e2e` if applicable
- [ ] Manual verification completed

## Screenshots

If applicable, add screenshots or recordings that help reviewers verify the change.
